title: Navigating Social Media Defamation:
body:
Navigating Social Media Defamation:
Insurance Coverage Insights

Social media has redefined how reputational damage unfolds. Unpack the legal landscape of defamation claims, from libel vs. slander to the rise of AI-generated content. Examine how Commercial General Liability (CGL) policies respond to these risks, common exclusions, and litigation strategies. Gain practical insights on evaluating claims, managing defense obligations, and advising clients on proactive risk management. With real-world case considerations and emerging trends, walk away with actionable takeaways for navigating defamation exposure in the digital age.

Pricing
$49.00*		Webinar Duration
60 minutes		CE Requirements
Verify your state and license CE requirements

Webinar Details

Navigating Social Media Defamation: Insurance Coverage Insights

Explore how social media defamation claims are reshaping risk for insurers. Unpack CGL policy coverage, key legal distinctions, and best practices for reducing exposure. Learn how reputational harm is handled, from claims investigation to outcomes all within a fast-evolving digital landscape.

Topics

  • Examine the legal distinctions between libel, slander, and digital defamation
  • Explore how CGL policies address reputational harm and where exclusions apply
  • Evaluate claims handling challenges and litigation strategies insurers use
  • Apply best practices for mitigating defamation-related exposure in policyholders
  • Assess future risks from deepfakes, AI-generated content, and evolving platforms
